10_that_is_the_fate: That is the fate that awaits you.
12_greetings_thief_disarmer_of: Greetings, Thief, Disarmer of Traps and Expert at Stealth.
13_i_speak_the_words: I speak the words of greatest aid, in times of greatest need.
14_welcome_paladin_honor_bright: Welcome, Paladin, honor bright and noble.
15_hirelings_from_the_northern:
Hirelings from the northern lands,
Aspect of a conquest plot.
Seek on island small to south.
Fortress walls hide what is sought.
16_with_one_cannot_be: With one, cannot be done.\nFire the foe that cannot regrow.
17_blood_and_water_shall:
Blood and Water shall entwine,
Water flows where Hades waits.
Pour libation to the depths,
Speak the chant to open gates.
18_water_water_everywherenbut_there:
Water, water everywhere,
But there is no air.
Touch the mouth where water flows,
To gain the gift for brave Heroes.
19_the_pillars_shall_be:
The Pillars shall be broken,
The Dragon shall be awoken.
Prophecy stone breaks, Dragon awakes.
All must fight, or Dragon takes flight.
1_greetings_slayer_of_monsters: Greetings, Slayer of Monsters and Master of Swords.
2_i_am_the_sibyl: I am the Sibyl, who sees what is to come. Hear now the future that fate brings you.
3_your_way_is_darkened: Your way is darkened with blood and death.
4_the_first_death_you: The first death you soon face is Death itself. Embrace it or not, Death shall drag you to its depths. Go willingly and you will gain.
5_the_next_death_you: The next death you face is one whose fate crosses yours. That which he cannot own, he would destroy. He will seek victory, even in his defeat.
6_seven_deaths_and_the: Seven deaths, and the Dragon grows restless in dreamless sleep. Four posts that pinned it to darkness have been broken in blood. Three more shall be shattered with death. The last death shall awaken the Dragon fully.
7_new_awakened_the_dragon: New awakened, the Dragon is weak. Each feel of fear and pain feeds it. Fix first the pillar, or it shall fly free.
8_death_brought_the_dragon: Death brought the Dragon to life. Only death shall defeat it. One must give up life willingly before the Dragon can die. Without sacrifice, the Dragon is deathless.
9_your_way_is_marked: Your way is marked with death. Face it gladly, and your way is marked with glory.
